text: {"is_complete": false, "next_step": {"type": "multiselect", "prompt_text": "Income confirmed at RM 3,800/month (B40). May not fit your profile but worth a parallel application."}, {"value": "um_bursary", "label": "UM Bursary", "description": "Small need-based grant for B40 students with mid-semester hardship.
